title: ixora ciliolata
intro: Ixora ciliolata, also known as the yellow ixora or jungle geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ixora ciliolata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ixora ciliolata can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
